reviews.comment:
Estuvimos el 14 de febrero, era la primera vez que  pasábamos,  una vergüenza  para el socio del aca. Moscas por todas partes debido a la  falta de higiene en el  parque, baños super descuidados( sucios)
Pensamos que  fue una eventualidad y de regreso   10 días después,  el mismo  desastre!!! Una pena!!!

(Translated by Google)
We were there on February 14th, it was our first time visiting, and it was a disgrace to the ACA member. Flies everywhere due to the lack of hygiene in the park, and the bathrooms were extremely neglected (filthy). We thought it was just a one-off, but when we returned 10 days later, it was the same disaster! What a shame!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5NXNta3p3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Malísimo, lugar, moscas x todos lados a llegar un punto que no se podía estar, estaba todos los baños sin papel , poca agua y sucio. Las moscas te daban ganas de vomitar de la cantidades que habían. Las dos veces que pase x ahí estaba igual. No vuelvo mas A ese lugar

(Translated by Google)
Terrible place, flies everywhere, it got to the point where you couldn't stand it. All the bathrooms had no toilet paper, little water, and were filthy. The sheer number of flies made you want to vomit. Both times I passed by, it was the same. I'm never going back to that place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5NXNhSUZnEAE

reviews.comment:
BAÑOS LIMPIOS
PRECIOS  NORMALES  ALTOS
MUY BUENA ATENCION EN LA PLAYA COMO EN EL BAR
COMO TODA ESTACION ACTUAL DEL ACA , FALTA MANTENIMIENTO EN PARQUIZACION DEL SECTOR DE DESCANSO O LLAMADO RECREO.

(Translated by Google)
Clean restrooms
High average prices
Very good service on the beach and in the bar
Like all current ACA resorts, the landscaping in the rest area (or recreation area) needs maintenance.

reviews.comment:
Al nacer Jesús, Satanás supo que había venido un Ser comisionado divinamente para disputarle su dominio. Tembló al oír el mensaje del ángel que atestiguaba la autoridad del Rey recién nacido. Satanás conocía muy bien la posición que Cristo había ocupado en el cielo como amado del Padre. El hecho de que el Hijo de Dios viniese a esta tierra como hombre le llenaba de asombro y aprensión. No podía sondear el misterio de este gran sacrificio. Su alma egoísta no podía comprender tal amor por la familia engañada.

(Translated by Google)
At Jesus' birth, Satan knew that a divinely commissioned Being had come to challenge his dominion. He trembled at the angel's message attesting to the authority of the newborn King. Satan was well aware of the position Christ had held in heaven as the Father's beloved. The fact that the Son of God would come to this earth as a man filled him with awe and apprehension. He could not fathom the mystery of this great sacrifice. His selfish soul could not comprehend such love for the deceived family.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5amZ2emRREAE
